design_philosophy: Industrial & Functional Clarity. A B2B CRM dashboard emphasizing legibility, high data density, and clear conversion paths for Tomibena's heating materials business. Mobile-first approach for drivers, control-room density for admins.

hierarchy.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-neutral-900

card.base: bg-white rounded-lg border border-neutral-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden

mobile_driver_card.base: bg-white rounded-xl border-2 border-neutral-100 shadow-sm p-4

buttons.primary: bg-[#2E7D32] text-white hover:bg-[#1B5E20] px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-neutral-700 border border-neutral-300 hover:bg-neutral-50 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-[#FF7043] text-white hover:bg-[#E64A19] px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-colors
buttons.mobile_action: w-full py-4 text-lg font-bold rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center gap-2

inputs.base: w-full border border-neutral-300 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-base focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2E7D32] focus:border-transparent bg-white

tables.wrapper: w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-lg border border-neutral-200 bg-white
tables.header: bg-neutral-50 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-neutral-500 uppercase tracking-wider
tables.cell: px-4 py-3 whitespace-nowrap text-sm text-neutral-700 border-b border-neutral-100

badges.success: bg-green-100 text-green-800 text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-medium
badges.warning: bg-orange-100 text-orange-800 text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-medium

dashboard.layout: Control Room grid. 4 metric cards at top. Charts and tables below.
dashboard.metric_cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, large semi-bold numbers.
dashboard.charts: Recharts for bar and pie. Use primary (#2E7D32) and accent (#FF7043) for data series.
dashboard.upsell_alerts: List of rows. Highlight with the #FF7043 accent for urgency.

orders.layout: Filter bar at top, dense data table below.
orders.actions: Row click opens an Order Sheet popup (Shadcn Dialog).

new_order.layout: Split layout. Left: Client details (auto-fill search) & Products. Right: Summary, Totals, Delivery, Payment.
new_order.live_stock: Show small badge next to product input indicating current stock. If stock is low, use #FF7043.

clients.layout: Table view with expandable rows to show order history and estimated annual consumption.

stock_receipts.layout: Table with highlight rules. Rows with stock < min stock alert should have a subtle #FF7043 background tint or badge.
stock_receipts.actions: Top right button to 'Add Receipt' (opens Dialog).

logistics.layout: 3-column wide layout (col-span-3 | col-span-3 | col-span-6 for map).
logistics.fleet_assignment: Accordions per vehicle with a loading bar (progress bar) showing weight vs max kg.
logistics.map: OpenStreetMap placeholder UI covering the full height of the column.

driver_view.layout: Mobile-first width (max-w-md mx-auto on desktop). Bottom navigation.
driver_view.daily_route: Vertical list of thick cards. Enormous buttons for Call, Navigate, Confirm.
driver_view.actions: Swipe to complete or one-tap massive button. Integration mock for Oblio shown on complete.

targets.layout: Tabs for Monthly/Quarterly/Annual. Cards showing progress bars for each agent.

interactions_and_motion.page_transition: Fade in with Framer Motion (opacity: 0 -> 1, y: 10 -> 0) duration 0.3s.
interactions_and_motion.modals: Dialog overlay backdrop-blur-sm, Dialog content slide in from bottom or scale up.

login_background.description: A white truck driving on a winding road surrounded by dense green forest plants. Use for login page background with a heavy dark overlay.

texture_accent.description: Stacked firewood texture. Use sparingly as a subtle background pattern for empty states or specialized cards with 5% opacity.

instructions_to_main_agent: Always set the primary theme to light, use #F5F6FA for the main app background, and #FFFFFF for content surfaces.
Strictly enforce the brand colors: #2E7D32 for primary actions/success and #FF7043 for alerts/warnings/errors.
Ensure the Driver View is built using a mobile-first paradigm with large touch targets, while the rest of the CRM is dense and optimized for desktop/tablet.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for all major headings and IBM Plex Sans for tables, inputs, and body text to maintain an industrial, clear B2B feel.
Build the dashboard using pure Tailwind grids with pure HTML div cards for flexibility, but heavily utilize Shadcn components (Dialog, Select, Input, Table) for interactive parts.
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case and role-based (e.g., data-testid='submit-order-button').
Mock the Oblio integration by showing a spinner and a success toast 'Invoice #XXXX issued' when a delivery is confirmed in the Driver View.
Mock the WhatsApp integration by wrapping the client phone numbers in an anchor tag pointing to wa.me/[number].
